response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a generalist full-stack engineer with genuine depth in high-throughput distributed systems and broad language coverage, but the resume contains no meaningful signal on the core competencies this role demands: experimentation platform design, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flagging, telemetry pipelines, or growth engineering. The position is Principal/IC6, requiring architectural leadership in these specific domains; the candidate is at Senior level and is currently in a career gap. While his Dunnhumby experience shows he can operate at scale, nothing in the resume suggests he has led or built the systemic, cross-team measurement and experimentation foundations that define this role.
strengths: Proven experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems handling millions of HTTP requests per second (Dunnhumby/Sociomantic)
Broad multi-language proficiency across TypeScript, C++, C#, Java, and DLang spanning backend, frontend, mobile, and embedded domains
Active technical community engagement through conference talks, workshops, and open-source projects demonstrating knowledge-sharing and communication ability
concerns: Zero visible experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or telemetry/metrics infrastructure — the explicit core of this role
No evidence of growth engineering, statistical analysis, or data-driven decision systems at any employer
Applying at Senior level for a Principal/IC6 position with a current open-ended career gap and no demonstrated cross-team architectural leadership at enterprise scale

key_factors.factor: Absent experimentation and growth systems experience
Seniority gap and current career gap
